basicDetails.implementingAgency: Uttarakhand Building And Other Construction Workers Welfare Board

schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide medical check-up facilities to registered construction workers through door-to-door visits, health camps, and collection centers.
schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The scheme “Medical Check-Up Facility” is implemented by the Uttarakhand Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (UKBOCWWB) under the Labour Department, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to provide medical check-up facilities to registered construction workers through door-to-door visits, health camps, and collection centers.
schemeContent.benefits_md: Under this scheme, medical check-up facilities are provided to construction workers.

children.text: The scheme “Medical Check-Up Facility” is implemented by the Uttarakhand Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (UKBOCWWB) under the Labour Department, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to provide medical check-up facilities to registered construction workers through door-to-door visits, health camps, and collection centers.
Under this scheme, medical check-up facilities are provided to construction workers.

To provide medical check-up benefits as part of social security to construction workers registered with the Uttarakhand Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, medical check-up facilities are offered through door-to-door visits, health camps, and collection centers.

applicationProcess.process_md: To provide medical check-up benefits as part of social security to construction workers registered with the Uttarakhand Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, medical check-up facilities are offered through door-to-door visits, health camps, and collection centers.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: 1. The applicant must be a construction worker registered with the Uttarakhand Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board.

children.text: The applicant must be a construction worker registered with the Uttarakhand Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board.
